Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses To Plaintiffs First Set Of Requests For Production
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Continued To Feb-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2024 Set For Trial On Feb-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re:DEFENDANT X CORP. Motion For A Protective Order.

Appearances:
Laura Lin, Esq. of Simpson Thacher & Bartlett LLP (650)251-5160 for Plaintiff Omid Kordestani
Eric Meckley, Esq. of Morgan Lewis & Bockius LLP (415)442-1013 for Defendant X Corp.

The matter is argued.
The court hears the arguement and adopts the tentative ruling.

X Corp.'s motion for protective order is denied. California law requires litigants to meet and confer regarding "each issue presented by" a discovery motion before bringing it to court. (CCP 2016.040.) Here, the meet-and-confer was limited to the number of requests for admission while X's motion is broader. (Rply. 3:23-26; Opp. 6:10-16.)

Proposed order signed and filed.
